jobs.name: Daily Status Check
jobs.message: Run a brief daily status check. Report: (1) any errors or warnings from recent logs if accessible, (2) a one-line summary of system health. Post the result to Discord using node /workspace/scripts/discord-post.js <YOUR_CHANNEL_ID> "<message>". Reply HEARTBEAT_OK when done.

jobs.name: Weekly Summary
jobs.message: Write a brief weekly summary based on memory/active-threads.md and any recent daily notes. Keep it under 200 words. Post to Discord using node /workspace/scripts/discord-post.js <YOUR_CHANNEL_ID> "<message>". Reply HEARTBEAT_OK when done.
